You need to be in the drella allow-list in order to use it.
You can see the current list of allow-listed users here: https://drella.osbuild.org/#config
If you are not there, please let us know on Slack in #drella.

-->

Clone owner/repository and add support for ...

When you are done, submit a PR to owner/repository.

<!--
## Tips
- Always mention on which repo you want to work, otherwise drella doesn't have a clue where to start. E.g. put "Clone owner/repository" into the issue description. Note that Drella assumes the repo is on github.com.
- Drella can only submit PRs to pre-approved repositories. Check https://drella.osbuild.org/#config to see the current list of allow-listed repos.
- Once drella opens a PR, you can ask follow-up questions on it, just don't forget to mention @drellabot

## Example
Clone drellabot/orchestrator, and add an MCP tool to close a PR. Same rules apply as for updating PRs: a task can only close PRs that it created itself.

## More examples
- running an E2E test on a set of PRs: https://github.com/drellabot/tasks/issues/27
- investigating a bug across repositories: https://github.com/drellabot/tasks/issues/26
-->
